title: Android 4.4 System Update
description: This software update will upgrade your Nexus 4 to Android 4.4, KitKat, which adds a number of new features and improves performance. Never miss a message with Hangouts, which can now bring all of your SMS and MMS messages alongside your other conversations and video calls. Search for nearby places in the all new phone app, and identify unknown callers with caller ID by Google. Print documents and photos right from your Nexus 4 on any Google Cloud Print or HP ePrint printer. To find out more, visit http://www.android.com/versions/kit-kat-4-4/index.html
